title: The most insane week in AI
summary: A YouTube video reviewing major AI announcements from a single week, including new models from DeepSeek, Kimi, Xiaomi, OpenAI, Qwen, Tencent, and various open-source projects. The host covers generative and multimodal models, reasoning systems, and robotics advances.
